model_observed: Gemini review of sanitized Codex-generated miss-classification report. Policy adherence is being evaluated based on the metadata and rules provided.

findings.finding: Independent review confirms all 60 case classifications adhere to the documented classification_policy. No policy violations were found.
Verified that all 32 cases with a 'prior_maintainer_decision' flag correctly retain the 'keep_as_holdout_signal' action, respecting the policy to not overturn previous maintainer decisions.

Verified that all 14 cases classified as 'move_to_public_regression_candidate' and all 11 cases classified as 'requires_expected_recheck' are correctly flagged for mandatory maintainer review, in compliance with policy.

Verified that all 'high_risk' domain cases and 'over_conversion_guard' cases respect their respective policy constraints, either by defaulting to a safe holdout signal or by correctly requiring maintainer review for any exceptions.
